name: Stir-Fried Chicken with Chilies and Peanuts
recipeIngredient: 2 Whole chicken breasts, boned, skinned, halved, and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine soy sauce, corn starch, garlic, and ginger in a medium bowl; mix well.
2. Add diced chicken, tossing to coat evenly. Let stand at room temperature for 15 minutes.
3. Soak dried mushrooms in hot water for 15 minutes; drain well and thinly slice.
4. Heat oil in wok over high heat. Add peanuts; stir-fry until golden brown. Remove with slotted spoon and set aside.
5. Add chilies and stir-fry until browned; remove with slotted spoon and set aside.
6. Add chicken, with marinade, and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
7. Blend in mushrooms, onion, vinegar, and sugar; stir-fry for 1 minute.
8. Return peanuts and chilies to wok, blending well.
9. Add sesame oil and continue cooking for 1 minute. Serve immediately over freshly steamed rice.
